# The Eden Institute

> A structured, worldview-anchored, terrain-based clinical herbalism institute. The Eden Institute teaches constitutional (Biblical) herbalism — the practice of matching herbs to a person's unique body pattern rather than to isolated symptoms — grounded in Scripture and clinical rigor. We also publish Eden's Table, a Christ-centered K–12 homeschool herbalism curriculum.

## Core concepts
- [What Is Constitutional Herbalism?](https://edeninstitute.health/constitutional-herbalism): Constitutional (Biblical) herbalism matches herbs to the person, not the symptom. Covers the six tissue states (hot, cold, damp, dry, tense, relaxed), the Five Tenets of Health (Nutrition, Elimination, Rest, Hydration, Spiritual Alignment), and the Scriptural basis for terrain-based plant medicine.
- [Why Eden](https://edeninstitute.health/why-eden): The worldview, philosophy, and founding conviction behind the Institute — a Western, biblically anchored alternative to Eastern and New Age frameworks.

## Programs
- [Eden's Table — Homeschool Herbalism Curriculum](https://edeninstitute.health/homeschool): A Christ-centered K–12 homeschool curriculum teaching Biblical herbalism and the body God designed, with open-and-go weekly lessons for Sprouts (K–2) and Seedlings (3–5).
- [Courses](https://edeninstitute.health/courses): The Eden Institute's three-tier clinical herbalism education program — Foundations, Body Systems & Clinical Literacy, and Clinical Application & Mentorship.
- [Free Body Pattern Assessment](https://edeninstitute.health/assessment): A short quiz that identifies your constitutional body pattern across the six tissue states.

## Community
- [The Rooted Community](https://edeninstitute.health/community): A private network for homesteaders, homeschool families, and liberty-minded believers building lives connected to the land, the body, and each other.

## About
- Name: The Eden Institute
- Focus: Constitutional / Biblical / terrain-based clinical herbalism; Christian homeschool herbalism education
- Distinctive terms: constitutional herbalism, Biblical herbalism, the six tissue states, the Five Tenets of Health, terrain-based herbalism
- Contact: hello@edeninstitute.health
